title: 舌戦開幕！賛美の湯 5話 喧嘩するほど仲がいい

script.text: ――そして、翌朝

translations.en: ――and the next morning.

script.text: それで全員……いや芽衣以外、酔っ払ったまま

translations.en: So everyone …… except for Mei‚ who fell asleep

script.text: まとめてこの部屋で寝落ちしてしまったと……

translations.en: in this room together while drunk. ……

script.text: ……面目次第もございません

translations.en: I am deeply ashamed of myself.

script.text: うう、頭がガンガンする……

translations.en: Ugh‚ my head is pounding……

script.text: ちょっと、kanaは酔っ払ってないからね

translations.en: wait‚ kana is not drunk.

script.text: めんどくさくなって、そのままここで寝ただけだもん

translations.en:
I just fell asleep here because it became
too much of a hassle.

script.text: 芽衣も！

translations.en: Mei too!

script.text: みんなでお喋りして一緒に寝るの、楽しかったよー

translations.en: It was fun chatting with everyone and sleeping together!

script.text: ああ、よく寝た……

translations.en: Ahaaa‚ I slept well ……

script.text: ……って今、何時！？　今日はライブ本番なのに！

translations.en: What time is ……?　I'm supposed to be at the live today!

script.text: 今すぐ出る準備しないと……

translations.en: I have to get ready to leave now……

script.text: …………あら？　貴方達、何してるの？

translations.en: ………… Eh? What are you girls doing?

script.text: ……もしかして、昨日の夜のこと覚えてない？

translations.en: …… don't you remember last night by any chance?

script.text: 昨日？　確か、ロビーでろくでもない話になって……

translations.en:
Yesterday? I think we were in the lobby
talking about some shit. ……

script.text: そういえば、なんで貴方達と同じ部屋にいるのかしら

translations.en: Come to think of it‚ why am I in the same room with yours?

script.text: マジか、酒飲んだ後のこと全部忘れてるとか

translations.en: Seriously‚ you've forgotten everything after a few drinks.

script.text: 三人とも、のんびりしてる場合じゃないんですよ！

translations.en: This is not the time for all three of you to be relaxing!

script.text: 九時には会場入りです、急いで支度して下さい！！

translations.en:
We'll be at the venue at 9 o'clock‚
so hurry up and get ready!

script.text: は、はい！

translations.en: Yes‚ sir!

script.text: 行ってらっしゃ～い

translations.en: Have a great day!

script.text: スリクスさん達、今日のライブも頑張ってね～

translations.en: Good luck at today's live‚ ⅢX!

script.text: はあ……せっかく温泉に連れて来てもらったけど

translations.en: Haa…… I've been taken to a hot spring‚

script.text: リフレッシュどころか、余計に疲れた気がするわ……

translations.en:
but instead of feeling refreshed‚
I'm feeling even more tired. ……

script.text: まさか、幽霊の出る旅館とは思わなかったし

translations.en: I didn't expect a ryokan to be haunted‚

script.text: スリクスさんの喧嘩にはずっと付き合わされるし……

translations.en: and I've had to deal with ⅢX's bickering for a long time. ……

script.text: あはは。でも芽衣は楽しかったよ

translations.en: Haha. But Mei had fun.

script.text: ……三人集まれば、喧嘩しかしない人達だけど

translations.en: …… when the three of us get together‚ all we do is fight.

script.text: でも、あれはあれで仲がいいんだとよく分かったわ

translations.en: But I could tell that they got along well with that one.

script.text: ずっと喧嘩してるのに仲がいい？　どういうこと？

translations.en: They fight all the time‚ but they get along? What do you mean?

script.text: そのくらいの距離が楽なのよ、きっと

translations.en: It's easy to be that close‚ I guess.

script.text: ……ほら、私はみんなより少し大人だから分かるの

translations.en:
…… See‚ I'm a little more mature than
everyone else‚ so I get it.

script.text: 良く分かんないけど……大人って、大変なんだね

translations.en: I don't know‚ but …… it's hard being an adult.

script.text: …………あ、昨日のお爺ちゃん

translations.en: ………… Oh‚ Grandpa from yesterday!

script.text: 昨日、やっぱりうるさかった？　でも喧嘩はしてないよ

translations.en: Was I still noisy yesterday? But we didn't fight.

script.text: ……え、喧嘩しなけりゃいいって訳じゃない？

translations.en: ……Eh‚ Isn't it good that we didn't fight?

script.text: 結局、喧嘩してた時以上にうるさかった？

translations.en: After all‚ were we even louder than when we were fighting?

script.text: ……あはは、確かにそうだね、ごめんね

translations.en: ……Ahaha‚ you're right‚ I'm sorry!

script.text: ……芽衣ちゃん、どうしたの？

translations.en: …… Mei‚ what's wrong?

script.text: そこに何か、気になるものでもあった？

translations.en: Is there something?

script.text: ううん、なんでもないよ

translations.en: No‚ it's nothing.

script.text: でも、喧嘩でうるさいより、ずっといいよね

translations.en: But it's a lot better than being loud in a fight.

script.text: スリクスさん達、本当は仲良しだもん

translations.en: ⅢX are really good friends.

script.text: ……え？　芽衣達も？

translations.en: Eh……? Mei and the others?

script.text: ねえ、遙子ちゃん

translations.en: Hey‚ Haruko-chan!

script.text: 芽衣達も、スリクスさん達と仲良くなれたかな？

translations.en: Can we get along with ⅢX?

script.text: そうね、少しは距離が近づいた気がするわね

translations.en: Yes‚ I think we're a little closer.

script.text: ……あら？　{user}君から連絡だわ

translations.en: ……Oh‚ {user}'s text.

script.text: ええとね、夕方からのスリクスさんのライブ

translations.en: Well‚ if we want to see ⅢX's live in the evening‚

script.text: もし観たければ、私達も関係者席に入れてもらえるって

translations.en: we'll be allowed to sit in the reserved seats.

script.text: 芽衣、行きたいな！

translations.en: Mei‚ I'd love to go!

script.text: 遙子ちゃんも一緒に行こうよ！

translations.en: Haruko-chan‚ let's go together too!

script.text: ……そうね

translations.en: …… I'm sure we can!

script.text: ……せっかく、少し仲良くなれたんだものね

translations.en: …… We're getting to know each other a little better now‚ aren't we?

script.text: 客の入りは……っと

translations.en: How much did the audience ……

script.text: ふふん、今日も満員御礼、これもkanaの力だよね！

translations.en: Hmmm‚ another full house today‚ another power of kana‚ right?

script.text: いつもながら、その自信どこから出てくるのかしら……

translations.en: As always‚ I wonder where that confidence comes from……

script.text: ……それにしても

translations.en: ……but

script.text: 結局、本当に幽霊なんていたのかしら

translations.en: I wonder if there really is a ghost after all.

script.text: 別にいいじゃん、どっちでも

translations.en: I don't really care either way.

script.text: 言いたいこと言えないし、あ～もうストレスだった！

translations.en: I can't say what I want to say!

script.text: 本当にね

translations.en: Really.

script.text: あなた達と仲良くなんて、冗談じゃないわ

translations.en: I'm not kidding about getting along with yours.

script.text: ……あら？　fran

translations.en: …… Oh? fran.

script.text: 今日は、いつもより髪のまとまりがいい感じね

translations.en: Your hair looks better than usual today.

script.text: そう？　あの温泉、髪のケアにも効いたのかしら

translations.en: Really? I wonder if that spa treatment did wonders for my hair.

script.text: mihoも肌の調子良さそうね

translations.en: Miho's skin looks good too.

script.text: そういえば、いつもよりメイクが楽だったわ

translations.en: Come to think of it‚ my makeup was easier than usual!

script.text: あの旅館、幽霊さえ出なければまた行きたいけど……

translations.en: I'd go back to that ryokan if it wasn't so haunted. ……

script.text: ちょっと、そこ！　二人だけで褒め合わないでよ！

translations.en: Hey‚ there! Don't compliment each other just the two of you!

script.text: 今こそ、kanaを讃えるべき時じゃないの！？

translations.en: Isn't now the time to praise kana!

script.text: はいはい

translations.en: ok~ ok~

script.text: 振り付けを一発で覚える記憶力に今日も期待してるわよ

translations.en:
I'm counting on you memory to memorize
the choreography in one shot today.

script.text: ……もうすぐ出番ね

translations.en: …… is almost ready to go on!

script.text: 二人とも、準備はいい？

translations.en: Are you two ready?

script.text: よっしゃ、今日も派手に目立ってくるかあ～！

translations.en: Alright‚ Let's show a great performance today!

script.text: いつだって全身全霊で――

translations.en: Always do everything in our power!

script.text: 最強を証明し続ける

translations.en: Always proving that we're the best.

script.text: 全ては絶対勝利のために

translations.en: All for absolute victory!

script.text: ……ⅢX、行くわよ

translations.en: ……ⅢX‚ let's go!
